content:
Each module includes:

- **Header** (e.g., `::GR1ND3R [PROJECT PROFILE]`)
- **Context Framing** (short summary, placement in system)
- **Main Content** (tagged, editable, with subheadings)
- **Next Steps / Metadata** (integration options, status, REF_ID)

---

### III. | EXAMPLE MODULE STRUCTURE

```md
::GR1ND3R [PROJECT PROFILE + LOGIC MODE + OUTPUTS]

> DOMAIN: Horror, Fiction, Found Footage
> LOGIC: Dream/Surreal
> OUTPUTS: Video, ARG, Fiction, Education
> STATUS: Active | Version: V1.0
> GLYPH: ⛓️

CONTENT:
A dream-inflected fiction project rooted in ambiguity, dread, and unreliable memory. Feeds into education, fiction publishing, video experiments, and AI ritual logic.
